member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Crypto.Infrastructure.Providers.KazKemManagedProvider
member.summary: Managed crypto provider using Antrapol.Kaz.Kem NuGet package. Provides KAZ-KEM key encapsulation operations at all security levels (128, 192, 256).

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Crypto.Infrastructure.Providers.KazKemManagedProvider.GetContext(Antrapol.IdP.Crypto.Domain.Enums.KeyAlgorithm)
member.summary: Gets or initializes the KAZ-KEM context for the specified algorithm.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Crypto.Infrastructure.Providers.KazKemManagedProvider.AlgorithmToSecurityLevel(Antrapol.IdP.Crypto.Domain.Enums.KeyAlgorithm)
member.summary: Maps KeyAlgorithm to Antrapol.Kaz.Kem.SecurityLevel.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Crypto.Infrastructure.Providers.KazKemManagedProvider.GetPublicKeySize(Antrapol.IdP.Crypto.Domain.Enums.KeyAlgorithm)
member.summary: Get the public key size for a given algorithm.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Crypto.Infrastructure.Providers.KazKemManagedProvider.GetPrivateKeySize(Antrapol.IdP.Crypto.Domain.Enums.KeyAlgorithm)
member.summary: Get the private key size for a given algorithm.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Crypto.Infrastructure.Providers.KazKemManagedProvider.GetCiphertextSize(Antrapol.IdP.Crypto.Domain.Enums.KeyAlgorithm)
member.summary: Get the ciphertext size for a given algorithm.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Crypto.Infrastructure.Providers.KazKemManagedProvider.GetSharedSecretSize(Antrapol.IdP.Crypto.Domain.Enums.KeyAlgorithm)
member.summary: Get the shared secret size for a given algorithm.

member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Crypto.Infrastructure.Providers.KazSignManagedProvider
member.summary: Managed crypto provider using Antrapol.Kaz.Sign NuGet package. Provides KAZ-SIGN digital signature operations at all security levels (128, 192, 256).

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Crypto.Infrastructure.Providers.KazSignManagedProvider.GetSigner(Antrapol.IdP.Crypto.Domain.Enums.KeyAlgorithm)
member.summary: Gets or creates a KazSigner for the specified algorithm.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Crypto.Infrastructure.Providers.KazSignManagedProvider.AlgorithmToSecurityLevel(Antrapol.IdP.Crypto.Domain.Enums.KeyAlgorithm)
member.summary: Maps KeyAlgorithm to Antrapol.Kaz.Sign.SecurityLevel.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Crypto.Infrastructure.Providers.KazSignManagedProvider.GetPublicKeySize(Antrapol.IdP.Crypto.Domain.Enums.KeyAlgorithm)
member.summary: Get the public key size for a given algorithm.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Crypto.Infrastructure.Providers.KazSignManagedProvider.GetPrivateKeySize(Antrapol.IdP.Crypto.Domain.Enums.KeyAlgorithm)
member.summary: Get the private key size for a given algorithm.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Crypto.Infrastructure.Providers.KazSignManagedProvider.GetSignatureOverhead(Antrapol.IdP.Crypto.Domain.Enums.KeyAlgorithm)
member.summary: Get the signature overhead size for a given algorithm.

member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Crypto.Infrastructure.Providers.KazSignNative
member.summary: P/Invoke declarations for the libkazsign native library. KAZ-SIGN-256 is the Malaysian National Post-Quantum Signature Algorithm (Security Level 5).

member.name: F:Antrapol.IdP.Crypto.Infrastructure.Providers.KazSignNative.PublicKeySize
member.summary: Public key size for KAZ-SIGN-256 (comparable to ML-DSA-87)

member.name: F:Antrapol.IdP.Crypto.Infrastructure.Providers.KazSignNative.SecretKeySize
member.summary: Secret key size for KAZ-SIGN-256

member.name: F:Antrapol.IdP.Crypto.Infrastructure.Providers.KazSignNative.SignatureSize
member.summary: Maximum signature size for KAZ-SIGN-256

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Crypto.Infrastructure.Providers.KazSignNative.KeyGen(System.Byte[],System.Byte[])
member.summary: Generate a KAZ-SIGN-256 keypair.
member.param: Output buffer for public key (2592 bytes)
Output buffer for secret key (4896 bytes)
member.returns: KAZ_SUCCESS on success, error code otherwise

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Crypto.Infrastructure.Providers.KazSignNative.Sign(System.Byte[],System.Byte[],System.UIntPtr,System.Byte[],System.UIntPtr@)
member.summary: Sign a message with KAZ-SIGN-256.
member.param: Output buffer for signature (4627 bytes max)
member.returns: KAZ_SUCCESS on success, error code otherwise

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Crypto.Infrastructure.Providers.KazSignNative.Verify(System.Byte[],System.Byte[],System.UIntPtr,System.Byte[],System.UIntPtr)
member.summary: Verify a KAZ-SIGN-256 signature.
member.returns: KAZ_SUCCESS if valid, KAZ_ERROR_INVALID_SIGNATURE if invalid

member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Crypto.Infrastructure.Providers.KazSignProvider
member.summary: Managed wrapper for KAZ-SIGN-256 native operations.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Crypto.Infrastructure.Providers.KazSignProvider.GenerateKeyPair
member.summary: Generates a new KAZ-SIGN-256 keypair.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Crypto.Infrastructure.Providers.KazSignProvider.Sign(System.Byte[],System.Byte[])
member.summary: Signs a message with KAZ-SIGN-256.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Crypto.Infrastructure.Providers.KazSignProvider.Verify(System.Byte[],System.Byte[],System.Byte[])
member.summary: Verifies a KAZ-SIGN-256 signature.

member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Crypto.Infrastructure.Providers.KazSignKeyPair
member.summary: KAZ-SIGN-256 keypair.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Crypto.Infrastructure.Providers.KazSignKeyPair.#ctor(System.Byte[],System.Byte[])
member.summary: KAZ-SIGN-256 keypair.

member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Crypto.Infrastructure.Providers.CryptographicException
member.summary: Exception thrown when cryptographic operations fail.

member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Crypto.Infrastructure.Providers.LibOqsCryptoProvider
member.summary: Crypto provider implementation using liboqs (Open Quantum Safe). This is a placeholder that will be implemented with actual liboqs bindings.

member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Crypto.Infrastructure.Providers.SoftHsmProvider
member.summary: HSM provider implementation using SoftHSM2 via PKCS#11. Suitable for development and testing environments.

member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Crypto.Infrastructure.Providers.SoftHsmOptions
member.summary: Configuration options for SoftHSM provider.

member.name: P:Antrapol.IdP.Crypto.Infrastructure.Providers.SoftHsmOptions.LibraryPath
member.summary: Path to the SoftHSM2 PKCS#11 library. Default paths: - Linux: /usr/lib/softhsm/libsofthsm2.so - macOS: /usr/local/lib/softhsm/libsofthsm2.so - Docker: /usr/lib/softhsm/libsofthsm2.so

member.name: P:Antrapol.IdP.Crypto.Infrastructure.Providers.SoftHsmOptions.TokenLabel
member.summary: Token label to use for operations. Must match the label used when initializing the token.

member.name: P:Antrapol.IdP.Crypto.Infrastructure.Providers.SoftHsmOptions.UserPin
member.summary: User PIN for the token.

member.name: P:Antrapol.IdP.Crypto.Infrastructure.Providers.SoftHsmOptions.SoPin
member.summary: Security Officer PIN for the token (used for admin operations).

member.name: T:Antrapol.IdP.Crypto.Infrastructure.Providers.UnifiedCryptoProvider
member.summary: Unified crypto provider that delegates to the appropriate specialized provider based on the requested algorithm.
member.remarks: Supported algorithms: - KAZ-SIGN (128, 192, 256): Malaysian National PQC Digital Signature - KAZ-KEM (128, 192, 256): Malaysian National PQC Key Encapsulation - ML-DSA (65, 87): NIST FIPS 204 Digital Signature (placeholder) - ML-KEM (768, 1024): NIST FIPS 203 Key Encapsulation (placeholder)

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Crypto.Infrastructure.Providers.UnifiedCryptoProvider.GetProvider(Antrapol.IdP.Crypto.Domain.Enums.KeyAlgorithm)
member.summary: Gets the appropriate provider for key generation based on algorithm.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Crypto.Infrastructure.Providers.UnifiedCryptoProvider.GetSigningProvider(Antrapol.IdP.Crypto.Domain.Enums.KeyAlgorithm)
member.summary: Gets the appropriate signing provider based on algorithm.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Crypto.Infrastructure.Providers.UnifiedCryptoProvider.GetKemProvider(Antrapol.IdP.Crypto.Domain.Enums.KeyAlgorithm)
member.summary: Gets the appropriate KEM provider based on algorithm.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Crypto.Infrastructure.Providers.UnifiedCryptoProvider.IsAlgorithmSupported(Antrapol.IdP.Crypto.Domain.Enums.KeyAlgorithm)
member.summary: Checks if an algorithm is supported.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Crypto.Infrastructure.Providers.UnifiedCryptoProvider.IsSigningAlgorithm(Antrapol.IdP.Crypto.Domain.Enums.KeyAlgorithm)
member.summary: Checks if an algorithm is a signing algorithm.

member.name: M:Antrapol.IdP.Crypto.Infrastructure.Providers.UnifiedCryptoProvider.IsKemAlgorithm(Antrapol.IdP.Crypto.Domain.Enums.KeyAlgorithm)
member.summary: Checks if an algorithm is a KEM algorithm.
